schema_note: OPERACIJE sections use columns 'Operacija | Opšta anestezija | Ukupno' (not Odjeljenje | Ambulanta as in batch 1). Mapped to fields: price_operacija_eur, price_anestezija_eur, price_ukupno_eur. Subsection 'TERCIJARNA ZDRAVSTVENA ZAŠTITA <oblast>' marks tertiary-level procedures within the same code series. Section 45 header is on page-087-bot (overlap with batch-5 range); included here to capture the full section.
